channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burham pledges to slash taxes on pubs if he become prime minister
item.description: Andy Burham pledges to slash taxes on pubs if he become prime minister

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour deputy says Farage is a threat to democracy and calls for misinformation clampdown
item.description: Labour deputy says Farage is a threat to democracy and calls for misinformation clampdown

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): JD Vance blames Henry Nowak’s murder on ‘mass invasion of migrants’
item.description: JD Vance blames Henry Nowak’s murder on ‘mass invasion of migrants’

item.title: FT UK Politics: Parents force Starmer into embracing social media ban
item.description: Parents force Starmer into embracing social media ban

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham aims to boost social housing if he becomes prime minister
item.description: Burnham aims to boost social housing if he becomes prime minister

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK ministers consider lowering university fees for EU students
item.description: UK ministers consider lowering university fees for EU students

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Burnham pledges to review NICs increase and cut business rates for pubs
item.description: Burnham pledges to review NICs increase and cut business rates for pubs

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham: Pubs and farmers are taxed unfairly - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham: Pubs and farmers are taxed unfairly - The Telegraph

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘Violence is a red line’: could Nigel Farage’s ‘pure, cold rage’ rhetoric damage his brand?
item.description: ‘Violence is a red line’: could Nigel Farage’s ‘pure, cold rage’ rhetoric damage his brand?

item.title: The Guardian: Burnham pledges to review NICs increase and cut business rates for pubs - The Guardian
